top3.sql:
SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_spent
FROM expense exp
JOIN budget b ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'speaker gifts'
GROUP BY e.event_name;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_spent
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
WHERE LOWER(exp.expense_description) LIKE '%speaker gift%'
   OR LOWER(exp.expense_description) LIKE '%gift%' AND exp.cost > 0
GROUP BY e.event_name;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_spent
FROM expense exp
JOIN budget b ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'speaker gifts'
GROUP BY e.event_name;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_spent
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
WHERE LOWER(exp.expense_description) LIKE '%speaker gift%'
   OR LOWER(exp.expense_description) LIKE '%gift%' AND exp.cost > 0
GROUP BY e.event_name;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_spent
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
WHERE exp.expense_description LIKE '%Speaker Gift%'
   OR exp.expense_description LIKE '%speaker gift%'
   OR (exp.expense_description LIKE '%Gift%' AND exp.cost > 0)
GROUP BY e.event_name;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_spent
FROM expense exp
JOIN budget b ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'speaker gifts'
GROUP BY e.event_name;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_spent
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
WHERE LOWER(exp.expense_description) LIKE '%speaker gift%'
   OR LOWER(exp.expense_description) LIKE '%gift%' AND exp.cost > 0
GROUP BY e.event_name;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_spent
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
WHERE exp.expense_description LIKE '%Speaker Gift%'
   OR exp.expense_description LIKE '%speaker gift%'
   OR (exp.expense_description LIKE '%Gift%' AND exp.cost > 0)
GROUP BY e.event_name;

final.sql:
SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_spent
FROM expense exp
JOIN budget b ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'speaker gifts'
GROUP BY e.event_name;
